cards.front: What is a class in object-oriented programming?
cards.back: A blueprint or template that defines the properties and behavior of an object

cards.front: What is the purpose of a constructor in a class?
cards.back: To initialize objects with default values when they are created

cards.front: What is the difference between a class and an object?
cards.back: A class is a blueprint, while an object is an instance of a class with its own values

cards.front: What is the purpose of a class variable?
cards.back: To store data that is shared by all objects of a class

cards.front: What is the purpose of a method in a class?
cards.back: To perform actions or operations on objects of a class
